message:
chore(beads): Document TOON encoding strategy decision (bd-2csfi)

Decision: Use Go library (toon-format/toon-go) for TOON encoding.

Key rationale:
- Pure Go aligns with project constraints
- No installation friction for users
- No subprocess overhead
- MIT license compatible

Impact:
- bd-4xgr6: Use toon.Marshal() from Go lib
- bd-2q3cg: Wrap toon.Marshal with JSON fallback
- bd-69cuc: No longer needed (no CLI to detect)

Full analysis documented in bd-2csfi notes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
